title: Spiritium Arsenal
description: Adds new type of material with its only purpose, KILLING
body:
**Adds new type of weapons**
- Spiritium Glaive

- Spiritium Longsword

**They have unique enchantments avalible only for themself**

*Soulless* (Longsword)
- R click - Spawns new mob soul (weak but stronger in groups)
- Hit somebody - Spawns 1 to 3 of these souls

*Restrained* (Glaive)
- Hit somebody and there will be a chance of a reduced max health (not stackeable)
- and once the effect is applied you cant add higher level (gambling core)


And if you want to play on a modded minecraft smp join [Discord](https://discord.gg/kUM5WS5qST)
